Peter Rabbit (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $115,234,093Details
International Box Office $242,883,214
Worldwide Box Office $358,117,307
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,828,298
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,901,403
Total $21,729,701
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role in his own adventure. Peter’s feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$25,010,928 (21.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.61 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,725 opening theaters/3,725 max. theaters, 7.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $151,284,277

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 9th, 2018 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: February 8th, 2018 (Wide) (Aruba)
February 8th, 2018 (Wide) (Curacao)
February 9th, 2018 (Wide) (Suriname)
February 9th, 2018 (Wide) (Pakistan)
February 14th, 2018 (Wide) (Cambodia)
Video Release: April 20th, 2018 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for mild thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2507 (Cert #50848), 12/20/2017)
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: Peter Rabbit
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Plot point: Love Triangle, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Olive Bridge Entertainment, Sony Pictures Animation, Animal Logic, 2.0 Entertainment
Production Countries: United States, Australia
Languages: English

Synopsis

Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role in his own adventure. Peter’s feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.
